case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. MCKENDRICK, DONALD et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKENDRICK, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1499 CALIFORNIA STREET, APT. #117, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENDRICK, DONALD
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT MCKENDRICK, DONALD DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED
